  2024	    function _validateAction(Clan storage clan, Clansman storage cs, ClanOrder calldata order, uint8 gotoRegion)
  2025	        internal
  2026	        view
  2027	        returns (StatusCode)
  2028	    {
  2029	        ActionType action = order.action;
  2030	
  2031	        if (action == ActionType.None) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_ACTION;
  2032	
  2033	        // DepositResources: must go to homebase
  2034	        if (action == ActionType.DepositResources) {
  2035	            if (gotoRegion != clan.baseRegion) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  2036	        }
  2037	
  2038	        // BuildWall / UpgradeBase / UpgradeMonument: must go to homebase
  2039	        if (action == ActionType.BuildWall || action == ActionType.UpgradeBase || action == ActionType.UpgradeMonument)
  2040	        {
  2041	            if (gotoRegion != clan.baseRegion) return StatusCode.ERR_NOT_AT_HOMEBASE;
  2042	        }
  2043	
  2044	        // ChopWood: must go to Forest
  2045	        if (action == ActionType.ChopWood) {
  2046	            if (gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_FOREST) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  2047	        }
  2048	        // MineIron: must go to Mountains
  2049	        if (action == ActionType.MineIron) {
  2050	            if (gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_MOUNTAINS) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  2051	        }
  2052	        // FishDocks: must go to WestDocks or EastDocks
  2053	        if (action == ActionType.FishDocks) {
  2054	            if (
  2055	                gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_WEST_DOCKS && gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_EAST_DOCKS
  2056	            ) {
  2057	                return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  2058	            }
  2059	        }
  2060	        // FishDeepSea: must go to DeepSea
  2061	        if (action == ActionType.FishDeepSea) {
  2062	            if (gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_DEEP_SEA) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  2063	        }
  2064	        // HarvestWheat: must go to WestFarms or EastFarms
  2065	        if (action == ActionType.HarvestWheat) {
  2066	            if (
  2067	                gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_WEST_FARMS && gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_EAST_FARMS
  2068	            ) {
  2069	                return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  2070	            }
  2071	        }
  2072	
  2073	        if (action == ActionType.DefendBase) {
  2074	            return _validateDefendBaseOrder(clan, order, gotoRegion);
  2075	        }
  2076	
  2077	        // MarketBuy/MarketSell: must target Unicorn Town
  2078	        if (action == ActionType.MarketBuy || action == ActionType.MarketSell) {
  2079	            if (_treasury.woodToken == address(0)) return StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN;
  2080	            if (gotoRegion != ClanWorldConstants.REGION_UNICORN_TOWN) {
  2081	                return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  2082	            }
  2083	            if (order.marketAmount == 0) return StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_ZERO_AMOUNT;
  2084	            // Validate token is a supported resource token (not gold itself)
  2085	            address tok = order.marketToken;
  2086	            if (tok == address(0) || tok == _treasury.goldToken) {
  2087	                return StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN;
  2088	            }
  2089	            if (
  2090	                tok != _treasury.woodToken && tok != _treasury.ironToken && tok != _treasury.wheatToken
  2091	                    && tok != _treasury.fishToken
  2092	            ) {
  2093	                return StatusCode.ERR_MARKET_UNSUPPORTED_TOKEN;
  2094	            }
  2095	            // Over-capacity buys are rejected at submission; no partial fills or overflow refunds.
  2096	            if (action == ActionType.MarketBuy && order.marketAmount > _remainingCarryForToken(cs, tok)) {
  2097	                return StatusCode.ERR_CARRY_FULL;
  2098	            }
  2099	            // Immediate market orders execute during submitClanOrders when the
  2100	            // worker is waiting in Unicorn Town and off cooldown. Other valid
  2101	            // market orders enqueue when the scheduled mission resolves.
  2102	            if (cs.currentRegion == ClanWorldConstants.REGION_UNICORN_TOWN && cs.state == ClansmanState.WAITING) {
  2103	                // Already at Unicorn Town — immediate if off cooldown, scheduled otherwise.
  2104	            }
  2105	        }
  2106	
  2107	        cs; // suppress unused warning
  2108	        return StatusCode.OK;
  2109	    }
  2110	
  2111	    function _validateDefendBaseOrder(Clan storage clan, ClanOrder calldata order, uint8 gotoRegion)
  2112	        internal
  2113	        view
  2114	        returns (StatusCode)
  2115	    {
  2116	        if (gotoRegion != clan.baseRegion) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_REGION;
  2117	        if (order.targetClanId != 0 && order.targetClanId != clan.clanId) return StatusCode.ERR_INVALID_TARGET;
  2118	        return StatusCode.OK;
  2119	    }

  2121	    // =========================================================================
  2122	    // TREASURY / POOL SEEDING

  2124	
  2125	    /// @notice One-time treasury initialization: register token and pool addresses.
  2126	    ///         Must be called before seedPools. Callable only once.
  2127	    function initTreasury(address[6] calldata tokens, address[4] calldata pools) external override nonReentrant {
  2128	        require(!_treasury.poolsSeeded && _treasury.woodToken == address(0), "ClanWorld: treasury already init");
  2129	        require(msg.sender == _treasury.treasuryOwner, "ClanWorld: not owner");

  2139	        _treasury.wheatGoldPool = pools[1];

  2143	
  2144	    /// @notice Owner-only. Seeds the four Unicorn Town AMM pools.
  2145	    function seedPools(PoolSeedConfig calldata cfg) external override nonReentrant {
  2146	        require(msg.sender == _treasury.treasuryOwner, "ClanWorld: not owner");
  2147	        require(!_treasury.poolsSeeded, "ClanWorld: pools already seeded");
  2148	        require(_treasury.woodToken != address(0), "ClanWorld: treasury not init");
  2149	
  2150	        _transferSeed(_treasury.woodToken, _treasury.woodGoldPool, cfg.woodSeed);
  2151	        _transferSeed(_treasury.goldToken, _treasury.woodGoldPool, cfg.goldSeedForWood);
  2152	        _transferSeed(_treasury.wheatToken, _treasury.wheatGoldPool, cfg.wheatSeed);
  2153	        _transferSeed(_treasury.goldToken, _treasury.wheatGoldPool, cfg.goldSeedForWheat);
  2154	        _transferSeed(_treasury.fishToken, _treasury.fishGoldPool, cfg.fishSeed);
  2155	        _transferSeed(_treasury.goldToken, _treasury.fishGoldPool, cfg.goldSeedForFish);
  2156	        _transferSeed(_treasury.ironToken, _treasury.ironGoldPool, cfg.ironSeed);
  2157	        _transferSeed(_treasury.goldToken, _treasury.ironGoldPool, cfg.goldSeedForIron);
  2158	
  2159	        StubPool(_treasury.woodGoldPool).seed(cfg.woodSeed, cfg.goldSeedForWood);
  2160	        StubPool(_treasury.wheatGoldPool).seed(cfg.wheatSeed, cfg.goldSeedForWheat);
  2161	        StubPool(_treasury.fishGoldPool).seed(cfg.fishSeed, cfg.goldSeedForFish);
  2162	        StubPool(_treasury.ironGoldPool).seed(cfg.ironSeed, cfg.goldSeedForIron);
  2163	
  2164	        _treasury.poolsSeeded = true;
  2165	
  2166	        emit PoolsSeeded(
  2167	            _treasury.woodGoldPool, _treasury.wheatGoldPool, _treasury.fishGoldPool, _treasury.ironGoldPool
  2168	        );
  2169	    }
  2170	
  2171	    function _transferSeed(address token, address pool, uint256 amount) internal {
  2172	        require(token != address(0) && pool != address(0), "ClanWorld: treasury not init");
  2173	        require(MinimalERC20(token).transferFrom(msg.sender, pool, amount), "ClanWorld: seed transfer failed");
  2174	    }

/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba packages/contracts/src/StubPool.sol | sed -n '1,220p'" in /home/claude/code/clan-world
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
     2	pragma solidity ^0.8.34;
     3	
     4	interface IERC20Balance {
     5	    function balanceOf(address account) external view returns (uint256);
     6	}
     7	
     8	/// @notice Constant-product AMM pool for one resource/gold pair.
     9	///         TOKEN_A is the resource token and TOKEN_B is gold. ClanWorld owns
    10	///         the swap surface because clans use the engine's internal accounting,
    11	///         while the treasury seeds real ERC20 balances into the pool once.
    12	contract StubPool {
    13	    address public immutable TOKEN_A; // resource token
    14	    address public immutable TOKEN_B; // gold token
    15	    address public immutable ENGINE; // ClanWorld address
    16	
    17	    uint256 public reserveA; // resource reserve
    18	    uint256 public reserveB; // gold reserve
    19	
    20	    bool private _seeded;
    21	
    22	    modifier onlyEngine() {
    23	        require(msg.sender == ENGINE, "StubPool: only engine");
    24	        _;
    25	    }
    26	
    27	    constructor(address tokenA_, address tokenB_, address engine_) {
    28	        TOKEN_A = tokenA_;
    29	        TOKEN_B = tokenB_;
    30	        ENGINE = engine_;
    31	    }
    32	
    33	    /// @notice Called by ClanWorld at seedPools time to set initial reserves.
    34	    ///         Can only be called once.
    35	    function seed(uint256 amountA, uint256 amountB) external onlyEngine {
    36	        require(!_seeded, "StubPool: already seeded");
    37	        require(amountA > 0 && amountB > 0, "StubPool: zero seed");
    38	        require(IERC20Balance(TOKEN_A).balanceOf(address(this)) >= amountA, "StubPool: missing token A");
    39	        require(IERC20Balance(TOKEN_B).balanceOf(address(this)) >= amountB, "StubPool: missing token B");
    40	        reserveA = amountA;
    41	        reserveB = amountB;
    42	        _seeded = true;
    43	    }
    44	
    45	    function getAmountOutForExactIn(uint256 amountIn) public view returns (uint256 amountOut) {
    46	        require(amountIn > 0, "StubPool: zero amount");
    47	        require(reserveA > 0 && reserveB > 0, "StubPool: not seeded");
    48	        amountOut = (reserveB * amountIn) / (reserveA + amountIn);
    49	    }
    50	
    51	    function getAmountInForExactOut(uint256 amountOut) public view returns (uint256 amountIn) {
    52	        require(amountOut > 0, "StubPool: zero amount");
    53	        require(amountOut < reserveA, "StubPool: insufficient resource reserve");
    54	        require(reserveB > 0, "StubPool: not seeded");
    55	
    56	        uint256 numerator = reserveB * amountOut;
    57	        uint256 denominator = reserveA - amountOut;
    58	        amountIn = numerator / denominator + (numerator % denominator == 0 ? 0 : 1);
    59	    }
    60	
    61	    /// @notice Exact-input sell: resource in, gold out.
    62	    function swapExactInForOut(uint256 amountIn, uint256 minOut) external onlyEngine returns (uint256 amountOut) {
    63	        return _swapExactInForOut(amountIn, minOut);
    64	    }
    65	
    66	    function _swapExactInForOut(uint256 amountIn, uint256 minOut) internal returns (uint256 amountOut) {
    67	        uint256 priorK = reserveA * reserveB;
    68	        amountOut = getAmountOutForExactIn(amountIn);
    69	        require(amountOut >= minOut, "StubPool: insufficient output");
    70	
    71	        reserveA += amountIn;
    72	        reserveB -= amountOut;
    73	
    74	        require(reserveA * reserveB >= priorK, "StubPool: k invariant");
    75	    }
    76	
    77	    /// @notice Exact-output buy: gold in, exact resource out.
    78	    function swapExactOutForInWithMaxIn(uint256 amountOut, uint256 maxIn)
    79	        external
    80	        onlyEngine
    81	        returns (uint256 amountIn)
    82	    {
    83	        return _swapExactOutForInWithMaxIn(amountOut, maxIn);
    84	    }
    85	
    86	    function _swapExactOutForInWithMaxIn(uint256 amountOut, uint256 maxIn) internal returns (uint256 amountIn) {
    87	        uint256 priorK = reserveA * reserveB;
    88	        amountIn = getAmountInForExactOut(amountOut);
    89	        require(amountIn <= maxIn, "StubPool: max input exceeded");
    90	
    91	        reserveA -= amountOut;
    92	        reserveB += amountIn;
    93	
    94	        require(reserveA * reserveB >= priorK, "StubPool: k invariant");
    95	    }
    96	
    97	    /// @notice Exact-input sell: clan sells amountIn of resource, gets goldOut.
    98	    ///         Legacy alias for Phase 6.1 scheduled-market code.
    99	    function sellResource(uint256 amountIn) external onlyEngine returns (uint256 goldOut) {
   100	        goldOut = _swapExactInForOut(amountIn, 1);
   101	    }
   102	
   103	    /// @notice Legacy quote alias for exact-output resource buys.
   104	    function quoteBuy(uint256 amountOut) external view returns (uint256 goldIn) {
   105	        goldIn = getAmountInForExactOut(amountOut);
   106	    }
   107	
   108	    /// @notice Exact-output buy: clan buys amountOut of resource, pays goldIn.
   109	    ///         Legacy alias for Phase 6.1 scheduled-market code.
   110	    function buyResource(uint256 amountOut) external onlyEngine returns (uint256 goldIn) {
   111	        goldIn = _swapExactOutForInWithMaxIn(amountOut, type(uint256).max);
   112	    }
   113	
   114	    function getReserves() external view returns (uint256, uint256) {
   115	        return (reserveA, reserveB);
   116	    }
   117	}

     1	// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
     2	pragma solidity ^0.8.34;
     3	
     4	/// @notice Minimal ERC20 boundary token. No external deps.
     5	contract MinimalERC20 {
     6	    string public name;
     7	    string public symbol;
     8	    uint8 public constant decimals = 18;
     9	
    10	    uint256 public totalSupply;
    11	    address public immutable DEPLOYER;
    12	    bool public treasurySeeded;
    13	
    14	    mapping(address => uint256) public balanceOf;
    15	    mapping(address => mapping(address => uint256)) public allowance;
    16	
    17	    event Transfer(address indexed from, address indexed to, uint256 value);
    18	    event Approval(address indexed owner_, address indexed spender, uint256 value);
    19	
    20	    constructor(string memory name_, string memory symbol_) {
    21	        name = name_;
    22	        symbol = symbol_;
    23	        DEPLOYER = msg.sender;
    24	    }
    25	
    26	    /// @dev Wrapped per forge-lint unwrapped-modifier-logic — keeps modifier
    27	    /// body slim so the require isn't duplicated at every call site.
    28	    function _onlyDeployer() internal view {
    29	        require(msg.sender == DEPLOYER, "MinimalERC20: not deployer");
    30	    }
    31	
    32	    modifier onlyDeployer() {
    33	        _onlyDeployer();
    34	        _;
    35	    }
    36	
    37	    function seedTreasury(address treasury, uint256 amount) external onlyDeployer {
    38	        require(!treasurySeeded, "MinimalERC20: treasury seeded");
    39	        require(treasury != address(0), "MinimalERC20: zero treasury");
    40	
    41	        treasurySeeded = true;
    42	        _mint(treasury, amount);
    43	    }
    44	
    45	    function _mint(address to, uint256 amount) internal {
    46	        totalSupply += amount;
    47	        balanceOf[to] += amount;
    48	        emit Transfer(address(0), to, amount);
    49	    }
    50	
    51	    function transfer(address to, uint256 amount) external returns (bool) {
    52	        balanceOf[msg.sender] -= amount;
    53	        balanceOf[to] += amount;
    54	        emit Transfer(msg.sender, to, amount);
    55	        return true;
    56	    }
    57	
    58	    function transferFrom(address from, address to, uint256 amount) external returns (bool) {
    59	        allowance[from][msg.sender] -= amount;
    60	        balanceOf[from] -= amount;
    61	        balanceOf[to] += amount;
    62	        emit Transfer(from, to, amount);
    63	        return true;
    64	    }
    65	
    66	    function approve(address spender, uint256 amount) external returns (bool) {
    67	        allowance[msg.sender][spender] = amount;
    68	        emit Approval(msg.sender, spender, amount);
    69	        return true;
    70	    }
    71	}

     1	// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
     2	pragma solidity ^0.8.24;
     3	
     4	import {Script, console} from "forge-std/Script.sol";
     5	import {MinimalERC20} from "../src/MinimalERC20.sol";
     6	import {StubPool} from "../src/StubPool.sol";
     7	import {ClanWorld} from "../src/ClanWorld.sol";
     8	import {PoolSeedConfig} from "../src/IClanWorld.sol";
     9	
    10	contract Deploy is Script {
    11	    function run() external {
    12	        uint256 deployerPrivateKey = vm.envUint("DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY");
    13	        address treasury = vm.addr(deployerPrivateKey);
    14	
    15	        vm.startBroadcast(deployerPrivateKey);
    16	
    17	        // 1. Deploy boundary tokens (gold existed in Phase 2 and is reused here).
    18	        MinimalERC20 wood = new MinimalERC20("Wood", "WOOD");
    19	        MinimalERC20 iron = new MinimalERC20("Iron", "IRON");
    20	        MinimalERC20 wheat = new MinimalERC20("Wheat", "WHEAT");
    21	        MinimalERC20 fish = new MinimalERC20("Fish", "FISH");
    22	        MinimalERC20 gold = new MinimalERC20("Gold", "GOLD");
    23	        MinimalERC20 blueprint = new MinimalERC20("ClanWorld Blueprint", "BPRT");
    24	
    25	        console.log("wood:     ", address(wood));
    26	        console.log("iron:     ", address(iron));
    27	        console.log("wheat:    ", address(wheat));
    28	        console.log("fish:     ", address(fish));
    29	        console.log("gold:     ", address(gold));
    30	        console.log("blueprint:", address(blueprint));
    31	
    32	        // 2. Deploy ClanWorld first (needed as engine arg for pools).
    33	        ClanWorld game = new ClanWorld();
    34	        console.log("CLAN_WORLD_CONTRACT_ADDRESS:", address(game));
    35	
    36	        // 3. Deploy 4 AMM pools (Phase 6.2: constant-product pools).
    37	        StubPool woodGold = new StubPool(address(wood), address(gold), address(game));
    38	        StubPool wheatGold = new StubPool(address(wheat), address(gold), address(game));
    39	        StubPool fishGold = new StubPool(address(fish), address(gold), address(game));
    40	        StubPool ironGold = new StubPool(address(iron), address(gold), address(game));
    41	
    42	        console.log("woodGoldPool: ", address(woodGold));
    43	        console.log("wheatGoldPool:", address(wheatGold));
    44	        console.log("fishGoldPool: ", address(fishGold));
    45	        console.log("ironGoldPool: ", address(ironGold));
    46	
    47	        address[6] memory tokens =
    48	            [address(wood), address(iron), address(wheat), address(fish), address(gold), address(blueprint)];
    49	        address[4] memory pools = [address(woodGold), address(wheatGold), address(fishGold), address(ironGold)];
    50	
    51	        game.initTreasury(tokens, pools);
    52	
    53	        uint256 resSeed = game.INITIAL_RESOURCE_POOL_SEED();
    54	        uint256 goldSeed = game.INITIAL_GOLD_POOL_SEED();
    55	        uint256 totalGoldSeed = goldSeed * 4;
    56	
    57	        wood.seedTreasury(treasury, resSeed);
    58	        wheat.seedTreasury(treasury, resSeed);
    59	        fish.seedTreasury(treasury, resSeed);
    60	        iron.seedTreasury(treasury, resSeed);
    61	        gold.seedTreasury(treasury, totalGoldSeed);
    62	
    63	        wood.approve(address(game), resSeed);
    64	        wheat.approve(address(game), resSeed);
    65	        fish.approve(address(game), resSeed);
    66	        iron.approve(address(game), resSeed);
    67	        gold.approve(address(game), totalGoldSeed);
    68	
    69	        game.seedPools(
    70	            PoolSeedConfig({
    71	                woodSeed: resSeed,
    72	                wheatSeed: resSeed,
    73	                fishSeed: resSeed,
    74	                ironSeed: resSeed,
    75	                goldSeedForWood: goldSeed,
    76	                goldSeedForWheat: goldSeed,
    77	                goldSeedForFish: goldSeed,
    78	                goldSeedForIron: goldSeed
    79	            })
    80	        );
    81	
    82	        vm.stopBroadcast();
    83	    }
    84	}

codex
The next pass is on heartbeat ordering and mission settlement. I’m checking whether enqueuing at resolve-time changes any same-tick behavior around deposits, bandits, or interrupted missions, and whether the new queue model left behind any liveness or duplication edges.

/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol | sed -n '300,430p'" in /home/claude/code/clan-world
 succeeded in 0ms:
   300	    function _settleMissionForClansman(
   301	        Clan storage clan,
   302	        Clansman storage cs,
   303	        uint32 clanId,
   304	        uint64 fromTick,
   305	        uint64 toTick
   306	    ) internal {
   307	        Mission storage m = _missions[cs.clansmanId];
   308	
   309	        // Path 6: dead clansman — invalidate active mission if any
   310	        if (cs.state == ClansmanState.DEAD) {
   311	            if (m.active) {
   312	                if (m.action == ActionType.DefendBase) {
   313	                    _clearDefender(cs.clansmanId);
   314	                }
   315	                m.active = false; // silent invalidation; dead clansman gets no MissionCompleted
   316	            }
   317	            return;
   318	        }
   319	
   320	        if (!m.active) return; // no active mission — nothing to settle
   321	
   322	        bytes32 tickSeed;
   323	        for (uint64 tick = fromTick; tick < toTick; tick++) {
   324	            tickSeed = _tickSeeds[tick];
   325	
   326	            // Path 1 → Path 2 transition: TRAVELING → ACTING at arrivalTick
   327	            if (cs.state == ClansmanState.TRAVELING && tick >= m.arrivalTick) {
   328	                cs.state = ClansmanState.ACTING;
   329	                cs.currentRegion = m.targetRegion;
   330	                emit WorkerArrived(clanId, cs.clansmanId, m.targetRegion, tick);
   331	
   332	                if (m.action == ActionType.DefendBase) {
   333	                    _registerDefender(m.targetRegion, clanId, cs.clansmanId);
   334	                }
   335	            }
   336	
   337	            if (m.action == ActionType.DefendBase) continue; // persistent defender mission
   338	
   339	            // Path 3: ACTING at/past settlesAtTick → resolve
   340	            if (cs.state == ClansmanState.ACTING && tick >= m.settlesAtTick) {
   341	                _resolveAction(clan, cs, m, clanId, tick, tickSeed);
   342	                if (m.active && getActionDuration(m.action) > 0) {
   343	                    _completeMission(cs, m);
   344	                }
   345	            }
   346	
   347	            // If mission completed during this tick, stop iterating
   348	            if (!m.active) break;
   349	        }
   350	    }
   351	
   352	    /// @dev Lazy settlement of a clan forward to currentTick.
   353	    ///      Mutates storage. Called before order submission and by public settleClan().
   354	    function _settleClan(uint32 clanId) internal {
   355	        Clan storage clan = _clans[clanId];
   356	        if (clan.clanId == 0) return;
   357	
   358	        uint64 curTick = _world.currentTick;
   359	        uint64 fromTick = clan.lastSettledTick;
   360	        if (fromTick >= curTick) return;
   361	
   362	        // Cap ticks settled per call to prevent block gas limit issues
   363	        uint64 maxSettleTicks = 200;
   364	        if (curTick > fromTick + maxSettleTicks) {
   365	            curTick = fromTick + maxSettleTicks;
   366	        }
   367	
   368	        uint32[] storage clansmanIds = _clanClansmanIds[clanId];
   369	
   370	        // Settle tick by tick from fromTick to curTick - 1
   371	        // (curTick is still open; we settle through the last closed tick)
   372	        for (uint64 tick = fromTick; tick < curTick; tick++) {
   373	            // 1. Apply upkeep for this tick
   374	            _applyUpkeep(clan, tick);
   375	
   376	            // 2. Wheat plot regrow check (lazy, per tick)
   377	            for (uint256 pi = 0; pi < 2; pi++) {
   378	                WheatPlot storage plot = _wheatPlots[clanId][pi];
   379	                if (plot.state == WheatPlotState.Regrowing && tick >= plot.regrowUntilTick) {
   380	                    plot.state = WheatPlotState.Harvestable;
   381	                    plot.remainingWheat = ClanWorldConstants.WHEAT_PLOT_STARTING_WHEAT;
   382	                    plot.regrowUntilTick = 0;
   383	                }
   384	            }
   385	
   386	            // 3. Advance each clansman (single-tick range: [tick, tick+1))
   387	            for (uint256 i = 0; i < clansmanIds.length; i++) {
   388	                Clansman storage cs = _clansmen[clansmanIds[i]];
   389	                _settleMissionForClansman(clan, cs, clanId, tick, tick + 1);
   390	            }
   391	        }
   392	
   393	        clan.lastSettledTick = curTick;
   394	        emit ClanSettled(clanId, curTick);
   395	    }
   396	
   397	    /// @dev Apply one tick of upkeep. Marks starvation if insufficient food.
   398	    function _applyUpkeep(Clan storage clan, uint64 tick) internal {
   399	        if (clan.livingClansmen == 0) return;
   400	
   401	        uint256 wheatNeeded = uint256(clan.livingClansmen) * ClanWorldConstants.WHEAT_UPKEEP_PER_CLANSMAN;
   402	        uint256 fishNeeded = uint256(clan.livingClansmen) * ClanWorldConstants.FISH_UPKEEP_PER_CLANSMAN;
   403	
   404	        bool hadEnoughWheat = clan.vaultWheat >= wheatNeeded;
   405	        bool hadEnoughFish = clan.vaultFish >= fishNeeded;
   406	
   407	        if (hadEnoughWheat) {
   408	            clan.vaultWheat -= wheatNeeded;
   409	        } else {
   410	            clan.vaultWheat = 0;
   411	        }
   412	        if (hadEnoughFish) {
   413	            clan.vaultFish -= fishNeeded;
   414	        } else {
   415	            clan.vaultFish = 0;
   416	        }
   417	
   418	        bool starving = !hadEnoughWheat || !hadEnoughFish;
   419	        if (starving && clan.starvationStartsAtTick == 0) {
   420	            clan.starvationStartsAtTick = tick;
   421	            emit ClanStarvationChanged(clan.clanId, true, tick);
   422	        } else if (!starving && clan.starvationStartsAtTick != 0) {
   423	            clan.starvationStartsAtTick = 0;
   424	            emit ClanStarvationChanged(clan.clanId, false, tick);
   425	        }
   426	    }
   427	
   428	    /// @dev Check if a clan is currently starving (lazy read).
   429	    function _isStarving(Clan storage clan) internal view returns (bool) {
   430	        return clan.starvationStartsAtTick != 0 && clan.starvationStartsAtTick <= _world.currentTick;

 succeeded in 0ms:

   862	    }
   863	
   864	    // =========================================================================
   865	    // WORLD PROGRESSION
   866	    // =========================================================================
   867	
   868	    /// @notice Permissionless heartbeat. Closes the current tick, advances tick counter.
   869	    ///         Execution order per spec §4.2 (CEI-safe):
   870	    ///         CEI guard: nextHeartbeatAtTs written first to close reentrancy window.
   871	    ///         Seed:      closedTick seed derived and published before step 1 so
   872	    ///                    settlement RNG reads real entropy, not zero.
   873	    ///         1. Settle missions completing this tick.
   874	    ///         2. Execute scheduled market actions for closedTick (external calls).
   875	    ///         3. Eager-settle clans touched by world events (Phase 3 stub).
   876	    ///         4. Resolve world events (season boundary, winter transitions).
   877	    ///         5. Increment tick and publish (seed already written above).
   878	    function heartbeat() external override nonReentrant {
   879	        require(block.timestamp >= _world.nextHeartbeatAtTs, "ClanWorld: heartbeat rate limited");
   880	
   881	        uint64 closedTick = _world.currentTick;
   882	
   883	        // CEI: update rate-limit guard before any external calls
   884	        _world.nextHeartbeatAtTs = uint64(block.timestamp) + ClanWorldConstants.HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS;
   885	
   886	        // Derive and publish seed for closedTick before step 1 (settlement reads it for RNG)
   887	        bytes32 newSeed = keccak256(abi.encode(block.prevrandao, _world.currentTickSeed, closedTick));
   888	        _tickSeeds[closedTick] = newSeed;
   889	        _world.currentTickSeed = newSeed;
   890	
   891	        // Step 1: Settle missions that complete this tick (settlesAtTick == closedTick).
   892	        // Bounded by 12-clan cap x 4 clansmen = 48 max iterations.
   893	        _settleCompletingMissions(closedTick);
   894	
   895	        // Step 2: Execute scheduled market actions for closedTick (may make external calls).
   896	        _executeScheduledMarketActions(closedTick);
   897	
   898	        // Step 3: Eager-settle clans touched by world events (Phase 3 bandit — stub).
   899	        // TODO Phase 3: _settleClansNearBandit(closedTick);
   900	
   901	        // Step 4: Resolve world events (season boundary, winter transitions).
   902	        _resolveWorldEvents(closedTick);
   903	
   904	        // Step 5: Increment tick and publish (seed already written above; complete the atomic pair).
   905	        uint64 newTick = closedTick + 1;
   906	        _world.currentTick = newTick;
   907	        _world.nextHeartbeatAtTick = newTick + 1;
   908	
   909	        emit TickAdvanced(closedTick, newTick, newSeed);
   910	    }
   911	
   912	    /// @dev Settle missions that complete exactly at `tick` (settlesAtTick == tick).
   913	    ///      Called from heartbeat before market execution and tick increment.
   914	    ///      Bounded by 12-clan cap x 4 clansmen = 48 max iterations.
   915	    function _settleCompletingMissions(uint64 tick) internal {
   916	        for (uint256 i = 0; i < _allClanIds.length; i++) {
   917	            uint32 clanId = _allClanIds[i];
   918	            Clan storage clan = _clans[clanId];
   919	            if (clan.clanState == ClanState.DEAD) continue;
   920	
   921	            uint32[] storage csIds = _clanClansmanIds[clanId];
   922	            for (uint256 j = 0; j < csIds.length; j++) {
   923	                Clansman storage cs = _clansmen[csIds[j]];
   924	                if (cs.state == ClansmanState.DEAD) continue;
   925	
   926	                Mission storage m = _missions[cs.clansmanId];
   927	                if (!m.active) continue;
   928	                if (m.settlesAtTick != tick) continue; // not due this tick
   929	
   930	                // Settle this mission using the single-tick range [tick, tick+1).
   931	                _settleMissionForClansman(clan, cs, clanId, tick, tick + 1);
   932	            }
   933	        }
   934	    }
   935	
   936	    /// @dev Resolve world events for the tick that was just closed.
   937	    ///      Uses closedTick+1 as the equivalent of the old `newTick` for transition checks.
   938	    function _resolveWorldEvents(uint64 closedTick) internal {
   939	        uint64 newTick = closedTick + 1;
   940	
   941	        // --- season boundary ---
   942	        if (newTick >= _world.seasonEndTick) {
   943	            _world.currentSeasonNumber += 1;
   944	            _world.seasonStartTick = _world.seasonEndTick;
   945	            _world.seasonEndTick = _world.seasonStartTick + ClanWorldConstants.SEASON_DURATION_TICKS;
   946	            // reset winter timers for new season
   947	            _world.winterActive = false;
   948	            _world.winterStartsAtTick = _world.seasonStartTick + ClanWorldConstants.TICKS_PER_WINTER_CYCLE
   949	                - ClanWorldConstants.WINTER_DURATION_TICKS;
   950	            _world.winterEndsAtTick = _world.seasonStartTick + ClanWorldConstants.TICKS_PER_WINTER_CYCLE;
   951	        }
   952	
   953	        // --- winter transitions (timer only; mechanics = Phase 10) ---
   954	        if (
   955	            !_world.winterActive && newTick >= _world.winterStartsAtTick
   956	                && _world.winterStartsAtTick < _world.seasonEndTick
   957	        ) {
   958	            _world.winterActive = true;
   959	            emit WinterStarted(newTick);
   960	        }

   812	    function test_immediateMarket_townOnCooldown_fallsBackToScheduled() public {
   813	        uint64 cooldownEndsAt = uint64(block.timestamp + 30);
   814	        (, address woodAddr, uint32 clanId, uint32 csId) =
   815	            _setupHarnessClanAt(ClansmanState.WAITING, ClanWorldConstants.REGION_UNICORN_TOWN, cooldownEndsAt);
   816	
   817	        uint256 goldBefore = world.getClan(clanId).goldBalance;
   818	        OrderResult[] memory r = _submitMarketOrder(clanId, csId, ActionType.MarketSell, woodAddr, 1e18, 0);
   819	
   820	        assertEq(
   821	            uint8(r[0].status), uint8(StatusCode.ERR_COOLDOWN_ACTIVE), "market order on cooldown must be rejected"
   822	        );
   823	        assertEq(world.getClan(clanId).goldBalance, goldBefore, "cooldown rejection should not trade");
   824	    }
   825	
   826	    function test_immediateMarket_notInTown_fallsBackToScheduled() public {
   827	        (, address woodAddr, uint32 clanId, uint32 csId) =
   828	            _setupHarnessClanAt(ClansmanState.WAITING, ClanWorldConstants.REGION_FOREST, 0);
   829	
   830	        OrderResult[] memory r = _submitMarketOrder(clanId, csId, ActionType.MarketSell, woodAddr, 1e18, 0);
   831	        Mission memory m = world.getActiveMission(csId);
   832	
   833	        assertEq(uint8(r[0].status), uint8(StatusCode.OK), "out-of-town market order should schedule");
   834	        assertEq(uint8(r[0].marketMode), uint8(MarketExecutionMode.Scheduled), "out-of-town should be scheduled");
   835	        assertTrue(m.active, "scheduled fallback should install a mission");
   836	        assertEq(
   837	            world.getScheduledMarketActionsForTick(m.settlesAtTick).length,
   838	            0,
   839	            "scheduled action queues when mission settles"
   840	        );
   841	    }

   855	            0,

   857	        );

   859	
   860	    function test_immediateMarketBuy_executesWhenMaxGoldSatisfied() public {
   861	        (, address woodAddr, uint32 clanId, uint32 csId) =
   862	            _setupHarnessClanAt(ClansmanState.WAITING, ClanWorldConstants.REGION_UNICORN_TOWN, 0);
   863	
   864	        Clan memory beforeClan = world.getClan(clanId);
   865	        Clansman memory beforeCs = world.getClansman(csId);
   866	        uint256 expectedGoldIn = woodPool.getAmountInForExactOut(1e18);
   867	
   868	        vm.expectEmit(true, false, false, true);
   869	        emit IClanWorldEvents.ImmediateMarketActionExecuted(
   870	            clanId,
   871	            csId,
   872	            ActionType.MarketBuy,
   873	            ClanWorldConstants.RESOURCE_GOLD,
   874	            expectedGoldIn,
   875	            uint8(ResourceType.Wood),
   876	            1e18,
   877	            world.getWorldState().currentTick
   878	        );
   879	        OrderResult[] memory r = _submitMarketOrder(clanId, csId, ActionType.MarketBuy, woodAddr, 1e18, 2e18);
   880	
   881	        Clan memory afterClan = world.getClan(clanId);
   882	        Clansman memory afterCs = world.getClansman(csId);
   883	        assertEq(uint8(r[0].status), uint8(StatusCode.OK), "immediate buy should be accepted");
   884	        assertEq(uint8(r[0].marketMode), uint8(MarketExecutionMode.Immediate), "buy should be immediate");
   885	        assertEq(afterClan.vaultWood, beforeClan.vaultWood, "vault wood should be unchanged");
   886	        assertGt(afterCs.carryWood, beforeCs.carryWood, "carry wood should increase immediately");
   887	        assertLt(afterClan.goldBalance, beforeClan.goldBalance, "gold should be debited immediately");
   888	        assertFalse(world.getActiveMission(csId).active, "immediate buy should not install a mission");
   889	    }
   890	
   891	    function test_immediateMarket_insufficientLiquidityFailsAndConsumesCooldown() public {
   892	        (, address woodAddr, uint32 clanId, uint32 csId) =
   893	            _setupHarnessClanAtWithWoodSeed(ClansmanState.WAITING, ClanWorldConstants.REGION_UNICORN_TOWN, 0, 5e18);
   894	
   895	        Clan memory beforeClan = world.getClan(clanId);
   896	
   897	        vm.expectEmit(true, false, false, true);
   898	        emit IClanWorldEvents.MarketActionFailed(
   899	            clanId,
   900	            csId,
   901	            ActionType.MarketBuy,
   902	            MarketExecutionMode.Immediate,
   903	            StatusCode.ERR_LIQUIDITY_INSUFFICIENT,
   904	            world.getWorldState().currentTick
   905	        );
   906	        OrderResult[] memory r =
   907	            _submitMarketOrder(clanId, csId, ActionType.MarketBuy, woodAddr, 6e18, type(uint256).max);
   908	
   909	        Clan memory afterClan = world.getClan(clanId);
   910	        Clansman memory cs = world.getClansman(csId);
   911	
   912	        assertEq(uint8(r[0].status), uint8(StatusCode.OK), "failed immediate action is still accepted");
   913	        assertEq(
   914	            uint8(r[0].marketMode), uint8(MarketExecutionMode.Immediate), "failed immediate action stays immediate"
   915	        );
   916	        assertEq(afterClan.vaultWood, beforeClan.vaultWood, "failed buy should not credit resources");
   917	        assertEq(afterClan.goldBalance, beforeClan.goldBalance, "failed buy should not debit gold");
   918	        assertGt(cs.cooldownEndsAtTs, block.timestamp, "failed immediate action should consume cooldown");
   919	        assertEq(uint8(cs.state), uint8(ClansmanState.WAITING), "failed immediate worker waits");
   920	        assertFalse(world.getActiveMission(csId).active, "failed immediate action should not schedule fallback");
   921	    }
   922

   980	
   981	    function test_immediateMarketBuy_overCapacityRejectsAtSubmit() public {
   982	        (ClanWorldTestHarness harness, address woodAddr, uint32 clanId, uint32 csId) =
   983	            _setupHarnessClanAt(ClansmanState.WAITING, ClanWorldConstants.REGION_UNICORN_TOWN, 0);
   984	        harness.setCarry(csId, ClanWorldConstants.WOOD_CAP - 5e17, 0, 0, 0);
   985	
   986	        Clan memory beforeClan = world.getClan(clanId);
   987	        Clansman memory beforeCs = world.getClansman(csId);
   988	
   989	        OrderResult[] memory r = _submitMarketOrder(clanId, csId, ActionType.MarketBuy, woodAddr, 1e18, 10e18);
   990	
   991	        Clan memory afterClan = world.getClan(clanId);
   992	        Clansman memory cs = world.getClansman(csId);
   993	
   994	        assertEq(uint8(r[0].status), uint8(StatusCode.ERR_CARRY_FULL), "over-capacity buy should be rejected");
   995	        assertEq(uint8(r[0].marketMode), uint8(MarketExecutionMode.None), "rejected buy has no mode");
   996	        assertEq(afterClan.vaultWood, beforeClan.vaultWood, "failed buy should not credit resources");
   997	        assertEq(afterClan.goldBalance, beforeClan.goldBalance, "failed buy should not debit gold");
   998	        assertEq(cs.cooldownEndsAtTs, beforeCs.cooldownEndsAtTs, "rejected buy should not consume cooldown");
   999	        assertEq(uint8(cs.state), uint8(beforeCs.state), "rejected buy should not change worker state");
  1000	        assertFalse(world.getActiveMission(csId).active, "rejected buy should not install a mission");
  1001	    }
  1002	
  1003	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  1004	    // Test 11: sell_creditsGold — after scheduled sell, clan.goldBalance > starter gold
  1005	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  1006	
  1007	    function test_sell_creditsGold() public {
  1008	        ClanWorldTestHarness harness = new ClanWorldTestHarness();
  1009	        world = harness;
  1010	        address woodAddr = _setupMarket();
  1011	        uint32 clanId = _mintClan();
  1012	        uint32 csId = _firstCs(clanId);
  1013	        // Give clansman carry wood so scheduled sell has something to sell
  1014	        harness.setCarry(csId, 10e18, 0, 0, 0);
  1015	
  1016	        uint256 goldBefore = world.getClan(clanId).goldBalance;
  1017	
  1018	        // Submit sell order — clansman travels to Unicorn Town then executes when the market mission settles
  1019	        OrderResult[] memory r = _submitMarketOrder(clanId, csId, ActionType.MarketSell, woodAddr, 5e18, 0);
  1020	        assertEq(uint8(r[0].status), uint8(StatusCode.OK), "sell order should be accepted");
  1021	
  1022	        // Find out which tick the action fires
  1023	        Mission memory m = world.getActiveMission(csId);
  1024	        uint64 executeAtTick = m.settlesAtTick;
  1025	        uint256 expectedGoldOut = woodPool.getAmountOutForExactIn(5e18);
  1026	
  1027	        // Advance ticks until the heartbeat before executeAtTick
  1028	        uint64 curTick = world.getWorldState().currentTick;
  1029	        for (uint256 i = 0; i < uint256(executeAtTick - curTick); i++) {
  1030	            _advanceTick();
  1031	        }
  1032	
  1033	        vm.expectEmit(true, false, false, true);
  1034	        emit IClanWorldEvents.ScheduledMarketActionExecuted(
  1035	            clanId,
  1036	            csId,
  1037	            ActionType.MarketSell,
  1038	            uint8(ResourceType.Wood),
  1039	            5e18,
  1040	            ClanWorldConstants.RESOURCE_GOLD,
  1041	            expectedGoldOut,
  1042	            executeAtTick
  1043	        );
  1044	        _advanceTick();
  1045	
  1046	        // Settle clan to apply any mission resolution
  1047	        world.settleClan(clanId);
  1048	
  1049	        uint256 goldAfter = world.getClan(clanId).goldBalance;
  1050	        assertGt(goldAfter, goldBefore, "gold should increase after sell");
  1051	    }
  1052	
  1053	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  1054	    // Test 12: buy_debitsGold — after scheduled buy, gold decreases, vault resource increases
  1055	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  1056	
  1057	    function test_buy_debitsGold() public {
  1058	        address woodAddr = _setupMarket();
  1059	        uint32 clanId = _mintClan();
  1060	
  1061	        // Give clan ample gold for the buy
  1062	        // We need a second clansman to do the buy while first does something else
  1063	        ClanFullView memory view_ = world.getClanFullView(clanId);
  1064	        uint32 csId = view_.clansmen[0].clansman.clansman.clansmanId;
  1065	
  1066	        uint256 goldBefore = world.getClan(clanId).goldBalance;
  1067	        uint256 vaultWoodBefore = world.getClan(clanId).vaultWood;
  1068	        uint256 carryWoodBefore = world.getClansman(csId).carryWood;
  1069	
  1070	        // Submit buy order for 1e18 wood, maxGoldIn = generous 500e18
  1071	        OrderResult[] memory r = _submitMarketOrder(clanId, csId, ActionType.MarketBuy, woodAddr, 1e18, 500e18);
  1072	        assertEq(uint8(r[0].status), uint8(StatusCode.OK), "buy order should be accepted");
  1073	
  1074	        Mission memory m = world.getActiveMission(csId);
  1075	        uint64 executeAtTick = m.settlesAtTick;
  1076	
  1077	        uint64 curTick = world.getWorldState().currentTick;
  1078	        uint256 ticksNeeded = uint256(executeAtTick - curTick) + 1;
  1079	        for (uint256 i = 0; i < ticksNeeded; i++) {
  1080	            _advanceTick();
  1081	        }
  1082	
  1083	        world.settleClan(clanId);
  1084	
  1085	        uint256 goldAfter = world.getClan(clanId).goldBalance;
  1086	        uint256 vaultWoodAfter = world.getClan(clanId).vaultWood;
  1087	        uint256 carryWoodAfter = world.getClansman(csId).carryWood;
  1088	        assertLt(goldAfter, goldBefore, "gold should decrease after buy");
  1089	        assertEq(vaultWoodAfter, vaultWoodBefore, "vault wood should be unchanged after buy");
  1090	        assertGt(carryWoodAfter, carryWoodBefore, "carry wood should increase after buy");
  1091	    }
  1092	
  1093	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  1094	    // Test 13: buy_maxGoldIn — buy fails with ERR_MAX_GOLD_IN_EXCEEDED
  1095	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
  1096	
  1097	    function test_buy_maxGoldIn() public {
  1098	        address woodAddr = _setupMarket();
  1099	        uint32 clanId = _mintClan();
  1100	        uint32 csId = _firstCs(clanId);
  1101	
  1102	        // maxGoldIn = 0 (will always be exceeded for any nonzero buy)
  1103	        OrderResult[] memory r = _submitMarketOrder(clanId, csId, ActionType.MarketBuy, woodAddr, 1e18, 0);
  1104	        assertEq(uint8(r[0].status), uint8(StatusCode.OK), "order submission should succeed");
  1105	
  1106	        Mission memory m = world.getActiveMission(csId);
  1107	        uint64 executeAtTick = m.settlesAtTick;
  1108	        uint64 curTick = world.getWorldState().currentTick;
  1109	
  1110	        // Advance all ticks UP TO (but not including) the execute tick
  1111	        if (executeAtTick > curTick) {
  1112	            for (uint256 i = 0; i < uint256(executeAtTick - curTick); i++) {
  1113	                _advanceTick();
  1114	            }
  1115	        }
  1116	
  1117	        // Now the next heartbeat will close executeAtTick — that's when MarketActionFailed fires
  1118	        // Place expectEmit right before the final heartbeat
  1119	        vm.expectEmit(true, false, false, true);
  1120	        emit IClanWorldEvents.MarketActionFailed(
  1121	            clanId,
  1122	            csId,
  1123	            ActionType.MarketBuy,
  1124	            MarketExecutionMode.Scheduled,
  1125	            StatusCode.ERR_MAX_GOLD_IN_EXCEEDED,
  1126	            executeAtTick
  1127	        );
  1128	        _advanceTick();
  1129	
  1130	        Clansman memory cs = world.getClansman(csId);
  1131	
  1132	        // Verify gold balance unchanged (buy failed)
  1133	        assertEq(world.getClan(clanId).goldBalance, 3e18, "gold should be unchanged after failed buy");
  1134	        assertGt(cs.cooldownEndsAtTs, block.timestamp, "failed scheduled buy should consume cooldown");
  1135	        assertEq(uint8(cs.state), uint8(ClansmanState.WAITING), "failed scheduled worker waits");
  1136	        assertEq(world.getScheduledMarketActionsForTick(executeAtTick).length, 0, "queue should be deleted");
  1137	    }
  1138	
  1139	    function test_scheduledMarketBuy_insufficientGoldFailsAndConsumesCooldown() public {
  1140	        address woodAddr = _setupMarket();
  1141	        uint32 clanId = _mintClan();
  1142	        uint32 csId = _firstCs(clanId);
  1143	
  1144	        OrderResult[] memory r = _submitMarketOrder(clanId, csId, ActionType.MarketBuy, woodAddr, 7e18, 10e18);
  1145	        assertEq(uint8(r[0].status), uint8(StatusCode.OK), "buy order should be accepted");
  1146	
  1147	        Mission memory m = world.getActiveMission(csId);
  1148	        uint64 executeAtTick = m.settlesAtTick;
  1149	        Clan memory beforeClan = world.getClan(clanId);
  1150	
  1151	        _advanceUntilNextHeartbeatCloses(executeAtTick);
  1152	        vm.expectEmit(true, false, false, true);
  1153	        emit IClanWorldEvents.MarketActionFailed(
  1154	            clanId,
  1155	            csId,
  1156	            ActionType.MarketBuy,
  1157	            MarketExecutionMode.Scheduled,
  1158	            StatusCode.ERR_NOT_ENOUGH_GOLD,
  1159	            executeAtTick
  1160	        );
  1161	        _advanceTick();
  1162	
  1163	        Clan memory afterClan = world.getClan(clanId);
  1164	        Clansman memory cs = world.getClansman(csId);
  1165	        assertEq(afterClan.vaultWood, beforeClan.vaultWood, "failed buy should not credit resources");
  1166	        assertEq(afterClan.goldBalance, beforeClan.goldBalance, "failed buy should not debit gold");
  1167	        assertGt(cs.cooldownEndsAtTs, block.timestamp, "failed scheduled buy should consume cooldown");
  1168	        assertEq(uint8(cs.state), uint8(ClansmanState.WAITING), "failed scheduled worker waits");
  1169	        assertEq(world.getScheduledMarketActionsForTick(executeAtTick).length, 0, "queue should be deleted");
  1170	    }
  1171	
  1172	    function test_scheduledMarketBuy_overCapacityRejectsAtSubmit() public {
  1173	        ClanWorldTestHarness harness = new ClanWorldTestHarness();
  1174	        world = harness;
  1175	        address woodAddr = _setupMarket();
  1176	        uint32 clanId = _mintClan();
  1177	        uint32 csId = _firstCs(clanId);
  1178	        harness.setCarry(csId, ClanWorldConstants.WOOD_CAP - 5e17, 0, 0, 0);
  1179	
  1180	        Clan memory beforeClan = world.getClan(clanId);
  1181	        Clansman memory beforeCs = world.getClansman(csId);
  1182	        OrderResult[] memory r = _submitMarketOrder(clanId, csId, ActionType.MarketBuy, woodAddr, 1e18, 10e18);
  1183	
  1184	        Clan memory afterClan = world.getClan(clanId);
  1185	        Clansman memory cs = world.getClansman(csId);
  1186	
  1187	        assertEq(uint8(r[0].status), uint8(StatusCode.ERR_CARRY_FULL), "over-capacity buy should be rejected");
  1188	        assertEq(uint8(r[0].marketMode), uint8(MarketExecutionMode.None), "rejected buy has no mode");
  1189	        assertEq(afterClan.vaultWood, beforeClan.vaultWood, "rejected buy should not credit resources");
  1190	        assertEq(afterClan.goldBalance, beforeClan.goldBalance, "rejected buy should not debit gold");
  1191	        assertEq(cs.cooldownEndsAtTs, beforeCs.cooldownEndsAtTs, "rejected buy should not consume cooldown");
  1192	        assertEq(uint8(cs.state), uint8(beforeCs.state), "rejected buy should not change worker state");
  1193	        assertFalse(world.getActiveMission(csId).active, "rejected buy should not install a mission");
  1194	    }
  1195	
  1196	    function test_scheduledMarketBuy_insufficientLiquidityFailsAndConsumesCooldown() public {
  1197	        address woodAddr = _setupMarketWithWoodSeed(5e18);
  1198	        uint32 clanId = _mintClan();
  1199	        uint32 csId = _firstCs(clanId);
  1200	
  1201	        OrderResult[] memory r =
  1202	            _submitMarketOrder(clanId, csId, ActionType.MarketBuy, woodAddr, 6e18, type(uint256).max);
  1203	        assertEq(uint8(r[0].status), uint8(StatusCode.OK), "buy order should be accepted");
  1204	
  1205	        Mission memory m = world.getActiveMission(csId);
  1206	        uint64 executeAtTick = m.settlesAtTick;
  1207	        Clan memory beforeClan = world.getClan(clanId);
  1208	
  1209	        _advanceUntilNextHeartbeatCloses(executeAtTick);
  1210	        vm.expectEmit(true, false, false, true);
  1211	        emit IClanWorldEvents.MarketActionFailed(
  1212	            clanId,
  1213	            csId,
  1214	            ActionType.MarketBuy,
  1215	            MarketExecutionMode.Scheduled,
  1216	            StatusCode.ERR_LIQUIDITY_INSUFFICIENT,
  1217	            executeAtTick
  1218	        );
  1219	        _advanceTick();
  1220	
  1221	        Clan memory afterClan = world.getClan(clanId);
  1222	        Clansman memory cs = world.getClansman(csId);
  1223	        assertEq(afterClan.vaultWood, beforeClan.vaultWood, "failed buy should not credit resources");
  1224	        assertEq(afterClan.goldBalance, beforeClan.goldBalance, "failed buy should not debit gold");
  1225	        assertGt(cs.cooldownEndsAtTs, block.timestamp, "failed scheduled buy should consume cooldown");

exec

   181	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   182	    // test_heartbeat_settlementBeforeMarket
   183	    //
   184	    // Proves Step 1 (settle) fires before Step 2 (market execute) within the SAME
   185	    // heartbeat closing tick T:
   186	    //   - cs0 is placed at Unicorn Town (region 3). Deposit to homebase Forest
   187	    //     (region 1) = 2 ticks travel. arrivalTick = T0+2, settlesAtTick = T0+3.
   188	    //   - cs1 at Forest submits MarketSell to UT (region 3) = 2 ticks travel.
   189	    //     settlesAtTick = T0+3. (Same tick as cs0 settles.)
   190	    //   - vault starts at 0; cs0 has carry wood.
   191	    //   - Heartbeat at T0+2: Step 1 deposits cs0 carry wood to vault, Step 2 sells
   192	    //     it. Gold increases only if Step 1 ran first (vault was 0 before Step 1).
   193	    //   - If ordering were reversed, sell would fail (vault still 0) and gold stays flat.
   194	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   195	    function test_heartbeat_settlementBeforeMarket() public {
   196	        _setupMarket();
   197	        uint32 clanId = _mintClan();
   198	        uint32 csId0 = _firstCs(clanId);
   199	        uint32 csId1 = _secondCs(clanId);
   200	
   201	        uint64 t0 = world.getWorldState().currentTick;
   202	
   203	        // Place cs0 at Unicorn Town (region 3). Homebase = Forest (region 1).
   204	        // Deposit from Unicorn Town to Forest: travel = 2 ticks.
   205	        world.setClansmanRegion(csId0, ClanWorldConstants.REGION_UNICORN_TOWN);
   206	
   207	        // cs0: submit Deposit. arrivalTick = t0+2, settlesAtTick = t0+3.
   208	        OrderResult[] memory r0 =
   209	            _submitOrder(clanId, csId0, ClanWorldConstants.REGION_FOREST, ActionType.DepositResources);
   210	        assertEq(uint8(r0[0].status), uint8(StatusCode.OK), "deposit order must succeed");
   211	        Mission memory depositMission = world.getActiveMission(csId0);
   212	        assertEq(depositMission.settlesAtTick, t0 + 3, "deposit settlesAtTick must be t0+3");
   213	
   214	        // cs1: at Forest. Submit MarketSell to UT. Forest→UT = 2 ticks.
   215	        // settlesAtTick = t0+3. Same tick as deposit settles.
   216	        OrderResult[] memory r1 = _submitMarketOrder(clanId, csId1, ActionType.MarketSell, address(woodToken), 5e18, 0);
   217	        assertEq(uint8(r1[0].status), uint8(StatusCode.OK), "market sell order must enqueue");
   218	        Mission memory sellMission = world.getActiveMission(csId1);
   219	        assertEq(sellMission.arrivalTick, t0 + 2, "sell arrivalTick must be t0+2");
   220	        assertEq(sellMission.settlesAtTick, t0 + 3, "sell settlesAtTick must be t0+3");
   221	
   222	        // Give cs0 carry wood (for deposit) and cs1 carry wood (for sell).
   223	        // Sell now draws from carry, not vault — zero vault to confirm vault is not involved.
   224	        world.setCarryWood(csId0, 10e18);
   225	        world.setCarryWood(csId1, 5e18);
   226	        world.setVaultWood(clanId, 0);
   227	        assertEq(world.getClan(clanId).vaultWood, 0, "vault wood must be 0 before test tick");
   228	
   229	        uint256 goldBefore = world.getClan(clanId).goldBalance;
   230	
   231	        // Advance to tick t0+4. The heartbeat closing t0+3 runs:
   232	        //   Step 1: _settleCompletingMissions(t0+3) → deposit fires, cs0 carry 10e18 → vault
   233	        //   Step 2: _executeScheduledMarketActions(t0+3) → sell fires, cs1 carry 5e18 → gold
   234	        _advanceToTick(t0 + 4);
   235	
   236	        uint256 goldAfter = world.getClan(clanId).goldBalance;
   237	        assertGt(goldAfter, goldBefore, "gold must increase: settlement ran before market sell");
   238	        assertEq(world.getClansman(csId0).carryWood, 0, "cs0 carry wood cleared by deposit");
   239	        assertFalse(world.getActiveMission(csId0).active, "deposit mission must be complete");
   240	    }
   241	
   242	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   243	    // test_heartbeat_atomicTickSeedPublish
   244	    //
   245	    // Proves Step 5: after heartbeat, currentTick increments by 1, currentTickSeed
   246	    // changes, and the new seed is deterministic from block.prevrandao + prior seed.
   247	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   248	    function test_heartbeat_atomicTickSeedPublish() public {
   249	        WorldState memory before_ = world.getWorldState();
   250	        uint64 tickBefore = before_.currentTick;
   251	        bytes32 seedBefore = before_.currentTickSeed;
   252	
   253	        bytes32 expectedSeed = keccak256(abi.encode(block.prevrandao, seedBefore, tickBefore));
   254	        world.heartbeat();
   255	
   256	        WorldState memory after_ = world.getWorldState();
   257	        assertEq(after_.currentTick, tickBefore + 1, "tick must increment by 1");
   258	        assertNotEq(after_.currentTickSeed, seedBefore, "seed must change after heartbeat");
   259	        assertEq(after_.currentTickSeed, expectedSeed, "seed must match keccak(prevrandao, oldSeed, closedTick)");
   260	
   261	        // Second heartbeat chains from the new seed
   262	        uint64 tick2 = after_.currentTick;
   263	        bytes32 seed2 = after_.currentTickSeed;
   264	        vm.warp(block.timestamp + ClanWorldConstants.HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS);
   265	        bytes32 expectedSeed2 = keccak256(abi.encode(block.prevrandao, seed2, tick2));
   266	        world.heartbeat();
   267	
   268	        assertEq(world.getWorldState().currentTick, tick2 + 1, "tick must increment again");
   269	        assertEq(world.getWorldState().currentTickSeed, expectedSeed2, "seed must chain from prior seed");
   270	    }
   271	
   272	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   273	    // test_heartbeat_seasonTransition
   274	    //
   275	    // Proves Step 4 (world events) fires AFTER Steps 1-3:
   276	    //   - season boundary is crossed at SEASON_DURATION_TICKS
   277	    //   - currentSeasonNumber increments on the heartbeat that closes tick
   278	    //     SEASON_DURATION_TICKS-1 (newTick = SEASON_DURATION_TICKS >= seasonEndTick)
   279	    //   - no crash or revert when there are no pending missions or market actions
   280	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   281	    function test_heartbeat_seasonTransition() public {
   282	        WorldState memory ws0 = world.getWorldState();
   283	        assertEq(ws0.currentSeasonNumber, 1, "season starts at 1");
   284	        assertEq(ws0.seasonEndTick, ClanWorldConstants.SEASON_DURATION_TICKS, "seasonEndTick starts at 360");
   285	
   286	        // Advance SEASON_DURATION_TICKS heartbeats to cross the boundary
   287	        for (uint256 i = 0; i < ClanWorldConstants.SEASON_DURATION_TICKS; i++) {
   288	            vm.warp(block.timestamp + ClanWorldConstants.HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL_SECONDS);
   289	            world.heartbeat();
   290	        }
   291	
   292	        WorldState memory ws1 = world.getWorldState();
   293	        assertEq(ws1.currentSeasonNumber, 2, "season must have incremented to 2 after Steps 1-4");
   294	        assertEq(ws1.currentTick, ClanWorldConstants.SEASON_DURATION_TICKS, "tick must be at season boundary");
   295	        assertEq(ws1.seasonStartTick, ClanWorldConstants.SEASON_DURATION_TICKS, "new seasonStartTick");
   296	        assertEq(ws1.seasonEndTick, ClanWorldConstants.SEASON_DURATION_TICKS * 2, "new seasonEndTick");
   297	    }
   298	
   299	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   300	    // test_heartbeat_noopTick
   301	    //
   302	    // Heartbeat with no pending missions and no queued market actions must:
   303	    //   - not revert
   304	    //   - increment currentTick exactly by 1
   305	    //   - change currentTickSeed
   306	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   307	    function test_heartbeat_noopTick() public {
   308	        uint64 tickBefore = world.getWorldState().currentTick;
   309	        bytes32 seedBefore = world.getWorldState().currentTickSeed;
   310	
   311	        world.heartbeat();
   312	
   313	        assertEq(world.getWorldState().currentTick, tickBefore + 1, "tick must increment");
   314	        assertNotEq(world.getWorldState().currentTickSeed, seedBefore, "seed must change");
   315	    }
   316	
   317	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   318	    // test_heartbeat_multipleStepsInOneTick
   319	    //
   320	    // Proves that when a mission settles at tick T AND a market action is queued at
   321	    // tick T, both fire in the same heartbeat without conflict.
   322	    //   - cs0 placed at Unicorn Town, deposits to Forest homebase: settlesAtTick = T0+3
   323	    //   - cs1 sells wood to UT from Forest: settlesAtTick = T0+3
   324	    //   Both succeed in the same heartbeat call at T0+3.
   325	    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   326	    function test_heartbeat_multipleStepsInOneTick() public {
   327	        _setupMarket();
   328	        uint32 clanId = _mintClan();
   329	        uint32 csId0 = _firstCs(clanId);
   330	        uint32 csId1 = _secondCs(clanId);
   331	
   332	        uint64 t0 = world.getWorldState().currentTick;
   333	
   334	        // cs0: placed at Unicorn Town (2 ticks from Forest homebase).
   335	        // Deposit: arrivalTick = t0+2, settlesAtTick = t0+3.
   336	        world.setClansmanRegion(csId0, ClanWorldConstants.REGION_UNICORN_TOWN);
   337	        world.setCarryWood(csId0, 10e18);
   338	        OrderResult[] memory r0 =
   339	            _submitOrder(clanId, csId0, ClanWorldConstants.REGION_FOREST, ActionType.DepositResources);
   340	        assertEq(uint8(r0[0].status), uint8(StatusCode.OK), "deposit must succeed");
   341	        assertEq(world.getActiveMission(csId0).settlesAtTick, t0 + 3, "deposit settlesAtTick must be t0+3");
   342	
   343	        // cs1: at Forest, sells wood to UT. Forest→UT = 2 ticks. settlesAtTick = t0+3.
   344	        // Give cs1 carry wood — sell draws from carry (not vault).
   345	        world.setCarryWood(csId1, 10e18);
   346	        OrderResult[] memory r1 = _submitMarketOrder(clanId, csId1, ActionType.MarketSell, address(woodToken), 5e18, 0);
   347	        assertEq(uint8(r1[0].status), uint8(StatusCode.OK), "market sell must enqueue");
   348	        assertEq(world.getActiveMission(csId1).arrivalTick, t0 + 2, "sell arrivalTick must be t0+2");
   349	        assertEq(world.getActiveMission(csId1).settlesAtTick, t0 + 3, "sell settlesAtTick must be t0+3");
   350	
   351	        uint256 goldBefore = world.getClan(clanId).goldBalance;
   352	
   353	        // Advance to tick t0+4 (the heartbeat closing t0+3 runs step1+step2 together).
   354	        _advanceToTick(t0 + 4);
   355	
   356	        // Both cs0 deposit (settled at T0+3) and cs1 sell (at T0+3) must have fired.
   357	        assertEq(world.getClansman(csId0).carryWood, 0, "deposit settled: carry cleared");
   358	        assertGt(world.getClan(clanId).goldBalance, goldBefore, "sell executed: gold increased");
   359	        assertFalse(world.getActiveMission(csId0).active, "deposit mission must be complete");
   360	    }
   361	}

docs/reviews/pr199-synthesis.md:17:| H1 | `ClanWorld.sol` `_processOrder`, `_validate*Upgrade*`, `_settle*Upgrade*` | 5.4 + 5.5 + 4.7 = **3/3** | HIGH | **Upgrade reservations debit vault at submit-time, not at homebase-arrival.** Spec §8 (`clanworld_v4_spec.md:882, :941`): build "not instant at submission time" — checked "if a clansman reaches homebase and attempts a build action." Impl debits during `_processOrder` even before travel completes. Affects upkeep + score + bandit-loot timing while builder is traveling. **Fix:** defer debit to settle-time (when clansman reaches homebase + ACTING tick). |

docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5368:docs/reviews/pr194-r2-codereview-codex-5-5.md:8631:NEEDS_FIXES. The 5 prior HIGH fixes appear to have landed: heartbeat now drives bandit attacks, ABI tuple order is updated via generated ABI, winter starvation replay uses historical ticks, blueprint rewards are `1e18`, and the target-death attack race now returns safely. I found no new HIGH issues, but there are 2 MEDIUM lifecycle/data-consistency bugs and 1 LOW test gap.

docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5610:docs/reviews/r2/pr194-codereview-codex-5-4.md:14959:- `packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1755` and `packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1005-1016` — Blueprint rewards use the wrong unit. Bandit defeat credits `targetClan.blueprintBalance += 1`, but monument upgrades consume `1e18` blueprint units. That makes one bandit win worth one wei of blueprint, and the new test in `packages/contracts/test/BanditAttackResolution.t.sol:252-261` locks that bug in. Suggested fix: award `1e18` per blueprint reward and update the event/test expectations to the same unit.
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5611:docs/reviews/r2/pr194-codereview-codex-5-4.md:15001:- `packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1755` and `packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1005-1016` — Blueprint rewards use the wrong unit. Bandit defeat credits `targetClan.blueprintBalance += 1`, but monument upgrades consume `1e18` blueprint units. That makes one bandit win worth one wei of blueprint, and the new test in `packages/contracts/test/BanditAttackResolution.t.sol:252-261` locks that bug in. Suggested fix: award `1e18` per blueprint reward and update the event/test expectations to the same unit.
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5626:docs/reviews/pr250-codereview-codex-5-4.md:2796:docs/reviews/pr194-r2-codereview-codex-5-5.md:8631:NEEDS_FIXES. The 5 prior HIGH fixes appear to have landed: heartbeat now drives bandit attacks, ABI tuple order is updated via generated ABI, winter starvation replay uses historical ticks, blueprint rewards are `1e18`, and the target-death attack race now returns safely. I found no new HIGH issues, but there are 2 MEDIUM lifecycle/data-consistency bugs and 1 LOW test gap.
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5627:docs/reviews/pr250-codereview-codex-5-4.md:2797:docs/reviews/pr194-r2-codereview-codex-5-5.md:8662:NEEDS_FIXES. The 5 prior HIGH fixes appear to have landed: heartbeat now drives bandit attacks, ABI tuple order is updated via generated ABI, winter starvation replay uses historical ticks, blueprint rewards are `1e18`, and the target-death attack race now returns safely. I found no new HIGH issues, but there are 2 MEDIUM lifecycle/data-consistency bugs and 1 LOW test gap.
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5633:docs/reviews/pr250-codereview-codex-5-4.md:3299:docs/reviews/pr194-r2-codereview-codex-5-4.md:8291:NEEDS_FIXES. The five named HIGH fixes mostly landed: heartbeat now drives the bandit lifecycle, `WorldState`/`WorldSnapshot` tuple order is aligned in Solidity + generated ABI + TS consumers, winter starvation replay is using replayed ticks, blueprint reward is now `1e18`, and the target-death race no longer reverts. But there is still a new HIGH game-logic regression in production: camped bandits pick attack targets from stale raw clan state, so once the heartbeat path is live they can attack the wrong clan.
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5634:docs/reviews/pr250-codereview-codex-5-4.md:3301:docs/reviews/pr194-r2-codereview-codex-5-4.md:8327:NEEDS_FIXES. The five named HIGH fixes mostly landed: heartbeat now drives the bandit lifecycle, `WorldState`/`WorldSnapshot` tuple order is aligned in Solidity + generated ABI + TS consumers, winter starvation replay is using replayed ticks, blueprint reward is now `1e18`, and the target-death race no longer reverts. But there is still a new HIGH game-logic regression in production: camped bandits pick attack targets from stale raw clan state, so once the heartbeat path is live they can attack the wrong clan.
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5639:docs/reviews/pr250-codereview-codex-5-4.md:3566:docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-5.md:5457:docs/planning/clanworld_v4_4_ui_indexer_getters.md:84:- Drives: top HUD bar, season clock, winter indicator, leaderboard panel, bandit summary
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5646:docs/reviews/pr250-codereview-codex-5-4.md:3581:docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-5.md:5911:docs/reviews/pr194-r2-codereview-codex-5-5.md:8631:NEEDS_FIXES. The 5 prior HIGH fixes appear to have landed: heartbeat now drives bandit attacks, ABI tuple order is updated via generated ABI, winter starvation replay uses historical ticks, blueprint rewards are `1e18`, and the target-death attack race now returns safely. I found no new HIGH issues, but there are 2 MEDIUM lifecycle/data-consistency bugs and 1 LOW test gap.

But there is still a new HIGH game-logic regression in production: camped bandits pick attack targets from stale raw clan state, so once the heartbeat path is live they can attack the wrong clan.

But there is still a new HIGH game-logic regression in production: camped bandits pick attack targets from stale raw clan state, so once the heartbeat path is live they can attack the wrong clan.

docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5653:docs/reviews/pr250-codereview-codex-5-4.md:3610:docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-5.md:7068:docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_4_ui_indexer_getters.md:84:- Drives: top HUD bar, season clock, winter indicator, leaderboard panel, bandit summary
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5673:docs/reviews/pr250-codereview-codex-5-4.md:4339:docs/planning/clanworld_v4_4_ui_indexer_getters.md:84:- Drives: top HUD bar, season clock, winter indicator, leaderboard panel, bandit summary
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5675:docs/reviews/pr250-codereview-codex-5-4.md:4499:docs/planning/V1/01 Blockchain Game Spec/clanworld_v4_4_ui_indexer_getters.md:84:- Drives: top HUD bar, season clock, winter indicator, leaderboard panel, bandit summary
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5677:docs/reviews/pr250-codereview-codex-5-4.md:4540:docs/planning/V1/05 0G/clanworld_0g_battleplan_and_spec.md:218:- `elder world snapshot` — `getWorldSnapshot()` — world tick, season clock, winter, leaderboard, bandit id
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5678:docs/reviews/r2/pr194-synthesis.md:11:The phase ships ~85% of the bandit subsystem (state machine, spawn, attack resolution, defender split, blueprint reward, target-death cleanup). All five reviewers independently flagged the SAME critical gap: **production bandits never attack**. They spawn → Camped → STUCK FOREVER. All the attack/loot/blueprint code is dead in the live heartbeat path; only test harnesses force the Camped→Attacking transition.
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5679:docs/reviews/r2/pr194-synthesis.md:21:| H1 | `ClanWorld.sol:1551, 1654, 1679` | 5.4 + 5.5 + 4.7 + Gemini = **4/5** | HIGH | **Camped→Attacking dispatch missing in production heartbeat.** `_transitionBanditToAttacking` only called from test harnesses. `_advanceBanditStates` only handles Spawned→Camped + Resting→Camped. As merged, real bandits spawn, camp, and stay stuck. Attack resolution / loot split / blueprint reward / target death cleanup are all DEAD CODE in the live path. |
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5680:docs/reviews/r2/pr194-synthesis.md:24:| H4 | `ClanWorld.sol:1755` + `1005-1016` | 5.4 = **1/5** | HIGH | **Blueprint reward unit mismatch.** Bandit defeat awards `targetClan.blueprintBalance += 1`. Monument upgrades consume `1e18` blueprint units. So one bandit win = 1 wei of blueprint. The new test at `BanditAttackResolution.t.sol:252-261` LOCKS THE BUG IN. Fix: award `1e18` and update test/event expectations. |
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5681:docs/reviews/r2/pr194-synthesis.md:52:1. **The Phase delivers ~85% of stated bandit goal.** State machine, spawn, eager-settle, attack resolution mechanics, defender split, blueprint reward, target-death cleanup — all present and individually tested. The missing 15% is the production wiring of Camped→Attacking dispatch + escape→rest recovery. This is the H1 finding.
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5685:docs/reviews/r2/pr194-codereview-opus-4-7.md:6:**NEEDS_FIXES.** The phase ships a mostly-coherent bandit subsystem, but it has a critical architectural gap: bandits **never actually attack in production**. There is code for spawn, camp transition, attack resolution, defender split, blueprint reward, and target-death cleanup — but nothing in `heartbeat()` ever transitions a Camped bandit into the Attacking state, so all of `_resolveAttackingBandits` / `_resolveBanditAttack` / loot / blueprint / cleanup logic is unreachable from a normal heartbeat. The defender registry, simulation parity, seed timing, and arithmetic all look sound otherwise. Recommend a single follow-up fix to wire Camped→Attacking dispatch (or explicit acknowledgment that Wave-N attack dispatch is deferred to a sub-issue) before merging.
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:5687:docs/reviews/r2/pr194-codereview-opus-4-7.md:61:1. **Phase delivers ~85% of the stated bandit goal.** State machine ✓, spawn ✓, eager-settle ✓, attack resolution mechanics ✓, defender split ✓, blueprint reward ✓, target-death cleanup ✓. Missing piece: target-selection + Camped→Attacking dispatch in production heartbeat (H1). All six newly added Solidity events for the attack lifecycle (`BanditTargetDied`, `WallDamagedByBandit`, `ClansmanKilledByBandit`, `BlueprintEarned`, `LootDistributed`) are unreachable until that gap closes — Convex indexer wiring for those events is therefore untested in integration.
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:6256:docs/reviews/pr198-codereview-codex-5-4.md:7385:docs/reviews/r2/pr194-synthesis.md:21:| H1 | `ClanWorld.sol:1551, 1654, 1679` | 5.4 + 5.5 + 4.7 + Gemini = **4/5** | HIGH | **Camped→Attacking dispatch missing in production heartbeat.** `_transitionBanditToAttacking` only called from test harnesses. `_advanceBanditStates` only handles Spawned→Camped + Resting→Camped. As merged, real bandits spawn, camp, and stay stuck. Attack resolution / loot split / blueprint reward / target death cleanup are all DEAD CODE in the live path. |
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:6274:docs/reviews/pr198-codereview-codex-5-4.md:10907:  Market I/O is using the wrong balance domain. Sells read/deduct `clan.vault*`, and buys credit `clan.vault*`, while submission still rejects buys based on worker carry capacity. Per the Phase 6 market spec, `market_sell` is from worker carry and `market_buy` returns to worker carry. As shipped, a clansman can liquidate home-vault inventory without hauling it to Unicorn Town, and bought goods become instantly eligible for upkeep/bandit theft without a deposit trip. The tests lock this in (`packages/contracts/test/ClanWorld.t.sol:775-888, 1013-1085, 1485-1490`).
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:6275:docs/reviews/pr198-codereview-codex-5-4.md:10939:  Market I/O is using the wrong balance domain. Sells read/deduct `clan.vault*`, and buys credit `clan.vault*`, while submission still rejects buys based on worker carry capacity. Per the Phase 6 market spec, `market_sell` is from worker carry and `market_buy` returns to worker carry. As shipped, a clansman can liquidate home-vault inventory without hauling it to Unicorn Town, and bought goods become instantly eligible for upkeep/bandit theft without a deposit trip. The tests lock this in (`packages/contracts/test/ClanWorld.t.sol:775-888, 1013-1085, 1485-1490`).

docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:6860:docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-5.md:3966:docs/reviews/pr194-r2-codereview-codex-5-4.md:7812:packages/contracts/test/BanditAttackResolution.t.sol:290:        emit BlueprintEarned(clanId, banditId, world.blueprintUnit(), world.getWorldState().currentTick);
docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-4.md:6861:docs/reviews/pr199-codereview-codex-5-5.md:4493:docs/reviews/r2/pr194-codereview-codex-5-4.md:14959:- `packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1755` and `packages/contracts/src/ClanWorld.sol:1005-1016` — Blueprint rewards use the wrong unit. Bandit defeat credits `targetClan.blueprintBalance += 1`, but monument upgrades consume `1e18` blueprint units. That makes one bandit win worth one wei of blueprint, and the new test in `packages/contracts/test/BanditAttackResolution.t.sol:252-261` locks that bug in. Suggested fix: award `1e18` per blueprint reward and update the event/test expectations to the same unit.

Suggested fix: award `1e18` per blueprint reward and update the event/test expectations to the same unit.
